Observability_Prompt: When you call your child by name in a calm environment, do they usually turn or look toward you?
Can your child pick up a small item using thumb and index finger (not full-hand grasp)?
Does your child point to objects to share interest (not only to request)?
Has your child started using at least one meaningful word consistently (besides babbling)?
Without gestures, can your child follow a simple instruction in familiar context?
Does your child do simple pretend play (for example feeding a toy or pretending to talk on a phone)?
Is your child combining two meaningful words together (for example 'more milk')?
